zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Beke於1329年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight32歲，母親Mary Willoughby30歲。他於大約1349年與Joan Stafford在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1368年在英國斯塔福爾被列為high sheriff of staffordshire。他去世於1369年7月24日享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾格亞特 巴福德哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Beke于1329年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，他的父亲Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight32岁，母亲Mary Willoughby30岁。他于大约1349年与Joan Stafford在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1368年在英国斯塔福爾被列为high sheriff of staffordshire。他去世于1369年7月24日享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾格亞特 巴福德哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Beke was born in 1329, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight, was 32 and his mother, Mary Willoughby, was 30. He married Joan Stafford about 1349, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1368, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of staffordshire in Staffordshire, England. He died on 24 July 1369, at the age of 40, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Beke est né en 1329, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Willoughby, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Stafford environ 1349, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1368, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of staffordshire à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1369, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Beke 1329 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight 32 und seine Mutter Mary Willoughby 30. Er hat um 1349 in England, United Kingdom Joan Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1368, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of staffordshire in Staffordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Juli 1369 im Alter von 40 Jahren und wurde in All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Beke è nato il nel 1329 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mary Willoughby, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joan Stafford circa 1349, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1368, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of staffordshire nel Staffordshire, England. Morì il 24 luglio 1369, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Bekeが1329年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert III de Beke, Knightは32歳，母Mary Willoughbyは30歳であった。約1349年にイギリスイギリスでJoan Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1368年，39歳の時，イギリススタフォードシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriff of staffordshireと記録されている。彼は1369年7月24日に40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアグレアト バーフォードアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary And All Saints Churchyard, Ch: 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 그리트 바퍼드 앨 세인츠 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Beke(이)가 1329년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Willoughby(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1368년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 high sheriff of staffordshire이었다. 그는 1369년 7월 24일 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 그리트 바퍼드 앨 세인츠 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Beke nasceu em 1329, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary Willoughby, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Stafford aproximadamente 1349, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1368, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of staffordshire em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1369, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary And All Saints Churchyard, Ch: алл сеинц чурчярд, грит барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Beke родился в 1329 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert III de Beke, Knight было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Willoughby, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Stafford около 1349 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1368 году, в возрасте 39 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of staffordshire в местности стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер 24 июля 1369 г. в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, грит барфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan Stafford aproximadamente 1349, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1368, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of staffordshire en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 24 de julio de 1369, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en All Saints Churchyard, Great Barford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
